name: Zesty Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Jalapeno chili, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
- Prepare the papaya by peeling and removing any seeds, then cut into 1-inch pieces.
- Peel and cut the kiwifruit in half.
- Slice the starfruit thinly.
- Halve the strawberries.
- For the dressing, mix together the cilantro, lime juice, finely chopped jalapeno, vegetable oil, and sugar until well combined.
- Toss all salad ingredients together in a bowl.
- Serve on salad greens if desired.
